endpoints.name: GET DATA
endpoints.description: Get all valuation journal entries with pagination, search, sort, and filter capabilities. Includes GR (Goods Receipt), DO (Delivery Order), and Stock Opname entries.

query_parameters.searchBy: Field to search in (description, reference_type, id, reference_id)
query_parameters.sort_by: Field to sort by (id, entry_date, description, reference_type, reference_id, created_at, updated_at)

endpoints.name: GET DATA BY ID
endpoints.description: Get a single valuation journal entry by ID with all journal lines, reference document information, and stock movements

endpoints.name: GET STATS
endpoints.description: Get comprehensive statistics for valuation journal entries including total entries, total debit/credit, stock movement statistics, and monthly breakdown

endpoints.name: EXPORT
endpoints.description: Export all valuation journal entries to Excel format with reference type information

response.description: Excel file containing all valuation journal entries with calculated total debit and credit amounts, including reference type information

JournalEntry.reference_type: ReferenceType (varchar 10, not null) - Values: SO, PO, STOCK_OP, ADJUSTMENT, NTP, PAYMENT, ASSET_TXN, ASSET_DEP, GR, DO

notes.reference_type_filter: Valuation Journal entries are filtered by reference_type IN ('GR', 'DO', 'STOCK_OP') - Goods Receipt, Delivery Order, and Stock Opname
notes.date_filtering: Entry date can be filtered using start_date and end_date query parameters. If both dates are the same, it filters for that specific day.
notes.searching: Search supports both string columns (description, reference_type) using ILIKE for case-insensitive matching, and numeric columns (id, reference_id) using exact match
notes.sorting: Default sorting is by entry_date descending (newest first)
notes.journal_lines: Each journal entry contains multiple lines with debit and credit amounts. The total debit should equal total credit for balanced entries.
notes.export: Export endpoint generates an Excel file with all valuation journal entries. The filename includes a timestamp for uniqueness and includes reference type information.
notes.monthly_stats: Monthly statistics group entries by month and calculate total count, debit, and credit amounts for each month
notes.stock_movements: Stock movement information is included in GetByID response, showing product details, warehouse, quantity, and cost information
notes.reference_documents: Reference document information provides details about the source document (GR, DO, or Stock Opname) that generated the journal entry
notes.stock_statistics: Stock movement statistics track total stock in (from GR and Stock Opname increases) and total stock out (from DO and Stock Opname decreases)
notes.accounting_principles: Valuation journals record inventory movements with debit to inventory accounts and credit to cash/accounts payable (for GR) or debit to cost of goods sold and credit to inventory (for DO)
